device-id.name: Device ID
device-id.description: Azure IoT device ID, used as MQTT client id
device-id.description_zh: Azure IoT 设备 ID，MQTT 客户端 ID

qos.name: QoS Level
qos.description: MQTT QoS level for message delivery
qos.description_zh: MQTT 消息传输使用的服务质量等级

format.name: Upload Format
format.description: JSON format of the data reported. In values-mode, data are split into `values` and `errors` sub objects. In tags-mode, tag data are put in a single array.
format.description_zh: 上报数据的 JSON 格式。在 values-format 格式下，数据被分为 `values` 和 `errors` 两个子对象。在 tags-format 格式下，数据被放在一个数组中。

offline-cache.name: Offline Data Caching
offline-cache.description: Offline caching switch. Cache MQTT messages when offline, and sync cached messages when back online.
offline-cache.description_zh: 离线缓存开关。连接断开时缓存 MQTT 消息，连接重建时同步缓存的 MQTT 消息到服务器。

cache-mem-size.name: Cache Memory Size (MB)
cache-mem-size.description: Max in-memory cache size in megabytes when MQTT connection exception occurs. Should be smaller than cache disk size.
cache-mem-size.description_zh: 当 MQTT 连接异常时，最大的内存缓存大小（单位：MB）。应该小于缓存磁盘大小。

cache-disk-size.name: Cache Disk Size (MB)
cache-disk-size.description: Max in-disk cache size in megabytes when MQTT connection exception occurs. Should be larger than cache memory size. If nonzero, cache memory size should also be nonzero.
cache-disk-size.description_zh: 当 MQTT 连接异常时，最大的磁盘缓存大小（单位：MB）。应该大于缓存内存大小。如果不为 0，缓存内存大小也应该不为 0。

cache-sync-interval.name: Cache Sync Interval (MS)
cache-sync-interval.description: Interval in milliseconds at which cached messages are synced to the broker once the connection is restored.
cache-sync-interval.description_zh: 连接恢复后缓存消息向服务端重传的时间间隔（单位：毫秒）。

auth.name: Authentication
auth.description: Device authentication method, uses SAS or X.509 certificates

sas.name: SAS Token
sas.description: Azure IoT Hub shared access signature (SAS) token
sas.description_zh: Azure IoT 中心共享访问签名 (SAS) 令牌

ca.name: CA
ca.description: CA certificate which signs the server certificate
ca.description_zh: 签发服务器证书的 CA 证书

cert.name: Device Certificate
cert.description: Client x509 certificate when using two way authentication
cert.description_zh: 使用双向认证时，客户端的 x509 证书

key.name: Device Private Key
key.description: Client private key when using two way authentication
key.description_zh: 使用双向认证时，客户端的私钥
